pr_description:
Our tests test _against_ documentation.js itself. Which is neat, but has the disadvantage that they include the version number of documentation.js, so every time that we release a version, the tests break because the version number doesn't match.

This PR that I should have written a long time ago sanitizes that version number, so tests continue to pass even when we release new versions.
commit_message: test: Make tests resilient between versions: no more annoying chores
test: Another tweak to make tests resistant to versioning
test: Normalize vue test output, rename to avoid interfering with other test cases

pr_description:
BREAKING CHANGE: this removes support for legacy decorators, because
in one place we had legacy and in another we didn't.

TODO:

- [x] Markdown test snapshots are looking funky and wrong.

Fixes #582

See `docs/CONFIG.md` for usage, but this is pretty much just as straightforward an implementation of #582 as I could manage.

The previous support for `@name` tags suppressing inference from surrounding code was ad-hoc and incomplete. This commit makes a `@name` tag (or a tag acting as a `@kind`/`@name` shorthand combo, like `@function`) detach the `ast` field from the comment context, so that the surrounding code will be universally ignored per the JSDoc spec.

Close #896
commit_message:
fix: @name tag disconnects comment

The previous support for @name tags suppressing inference from
surrounding code was ad-hoc and incomplete. This commit makes a @name
tag (or a tag acting as a @kind/@name shorthand combo, like @function)
detach the `ast` field from the comment context, so that the surrounding
code will be universally ignored per the JSDoc spec.
test: Add stronger jest tests for inference
